CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2003 Off Calendar

Defaul Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jul-22-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR:Leticia Perez, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Appearances:
Douglas Alan Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corporation.
No appearance by defendant.
After hearing plaintiff's declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Trinity Capital Corporation and against the defendant Jeff Collins Enterprise Inc. for return of equipment and money judgment as follows:
Principal of $49,703.65
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Interest of $11,130.46
Costs $299.50
For the total of $53,633.61
Does 1-10 are dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.
